name: codex-deepsearch
description: Codex-native deep research with source/claim ledgers, review gates, /goal checkpoints, and optional codex-with-cc-plus delegation.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-native research harness with source/claim ledgers and review gates
interface.longDescription: Turns deep research into an evidence-led, reviewable workflow. Enforces a minimum contract: research design, scenario matrix, source/claim ledgers, counter-evidence, review gate, and readiness decision. Supports /goal checkpoints for long-running research and optional codex-with-cc-plus worker delegation.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-deepsearch to run source-backed research with ledgers and review gate.
Use $codex-deepsearch to research whether a planned feature should become an implementation spec.
Use $codex-deepsearch with codex-with-cc-plus to widen search and run a skeptic review before synthesis.
